name: 文档受众改写

observable_attributes.edit_strategy: adaptation approach: simplify in-place vs. create parallel simplified versions vs. complete rewrite; per-file vs. batch processing; how much original structure is preserved
observable_attributes.output_detail: adaptation depth: literal simplification vs. restructuring for lay audience vs. complete rewrite with explanatory additions
observable_attributes.version_strategy: whether professional originals are preserved alongside simplified versions or overwritten
observable_attributes.output_structure: whether document structure is preserved or adapted for non-expert readers (e.g., adding glossaries, removing section numbers)
observable_attributes.cross_modal_handling: whether audio memos (MP3) and PDF legal documents are processed: skip entirely vs. create text summaries vs. reference in simplified materials

prompt_zh:
这个文件夹包含一位律师的案件材料，分布在5个子目录中：case_reports/ 包含法院判决书和案件报告（DOCX格式），legal_reference/ 包含法律条文和判决书PDF，audio_memos/ 包含案件口述备忘录（MP3），client_communications/ 包含法律援助相关邮件（EML），context/ 包含客户背景和会议议程。

一位非法律背景的客户（陈丽华女士）即将来开会，需要你将关键文档改写为通俗易懂的版本。请阅读 context/ 目录了解客户背景和会议需求，然后处理文件夹中的核心文档，将专业法律内容改写为普通人能理解的语言。

改写方式（直接修改原文件、创建平行通俗版本、或完全重写）由你决定。
prompt_en:
This folder contains a lawyer's case materials organized in 5 subdirectories: case_reports/ has court judgments and case reports (DOCX), legal_reference/ has statutes and judgment PDFs, audio_memos/ has case audio memos (MP3), client_communications/ has legal aid emails (EML), and context/ has client background and meeting agenda.

A non-legal client (Mrs. Chen Lihua) is coming for a meeting and needs key documents rewritten in plain language she can understand. Please read the context/ directory to understand the client's background and meeting needs, then process the core documents in the folder, adapting professional legal content into language a layperson can understand.

The adaptation approach (edit originals in-place, create parallel simplified versions, or complete rewrite) is your choice.
behavioral_freedom: Adaptation strategy: simplify in-place vs. create parallel '_simplified' versions vs. complete rewrite
Whether to preserve original professional documents unchanged
Adaptation depth: word-level simplification vs. structural reorganization vs. adding explanatory context
How to handle audio memos (MP3): skip vs. summarize vs. reference in written materials
How to handle PDF legal documents: skip vs. create text summary vs. extract key points
File organization: same directory vs. new client_versions/ subdirectory vs. per-topic folders
Naming convention: _simplified suffix vs. new descriptive names vs. overwrite originals
Whether to create a single consolidated briefing document vs. one simplified version per original
